stemHtml: Flying as G-ACME, you need your magnetic bearing from Karlsgrab aerodrome. What should you transmit?

options.a: Karlsgrab Homer, Golf Alfa Charlie Mike Echo request QDM.
options.b: Karlsgrab Approach, Golf Alfa Charlie Mike Echo request QNH.
options.c: Karlsgrab Homer, Golf Alfa Charlie Mike Echo request QDR.
options.d: Karlsgrab Approach, Golf Alfa Charlie Mike Echo request QGH.
